title: dyssodia porophyllum
intro: Dyssodia porophyllum, also known as the gray fleabane or porophyllum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Dyssodia porophyllum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Dyssodia porophyllum can be prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
